title: Nursery-forward field-station wave
summary: Twenty-fifth structured packet for Eco Explorer. The first nursery-forward wave is now implemented as a compact `SEASON | NURSERY` field-station split. Nursery v1 adds safe gathering, one teaching bed, automatic composting across world steps, six route-aligned growable projects, compact reward hooks, and two tiny habitat extras. The next work is to review that merged gameplay pass, then prep and activate the third live route, `Edge Pattern Line`, with nursery-aware support hooks.

execution_order.goal: Review the merged nursery-forward field-station pass for readability, ethics, and whether it deepens the game loop without turning into a management sim.
execution_order.why_now: The nursery landed as one coherent pass, so it needs one coherent critique before the next route grows around it.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the third live route, `Edge Pattern Line`, with nursery-aware support hooks.
execution_order.why_now: The next route should be authored with the new nursery loop in mind instead of bolting it on later.

execution_order.goal: Activate `Edge Pattern Line` after the nursery foundation stabilizes.
execution_order.why_now: The nursery should now deepen route progression instead of delaying it.

guardrails: Keep the nursery secondary to expeditions and route progression.
Do not add broad harvesting, selling, or a heavier inventory.
Keep gathering science-safe and selectively allowlisted.
Do not expand the teaching bed beyond one active project in v1.
Route support should stay hint-like and fieldwork-first.
Habitat extras should remain tiny teaching-garden signals, not base-building.
acceptance_focus: The nursery makes the field station feel more game-like without becoming a second management game.
The save model, tests, and runtime stay deterministic.
The next live route can now use nursery support hooks as a real part of the loop.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, docs/reports/2026-03-30-nursery-forward-field-adventure.md, and this packet. Treat the nursery as a landed compact station loop. Review it as one merged pass, then move toward the third route with nursery-aware hooks instead of reopening the old wave-by-wave plan.
